name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve J.A.R.V.I.S.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**System Environment:**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS Sonoma]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.10.12]
- Ollama Model Name: [e.g. llama3.2:3b]

**Command Triggered:**
What spoken keyword or command did you run?

**Error Logs (`jarvis.log`):**
If applicable, paste the relevant lines from `jarvis.log`:
```text
[paste logs here]
```

**Additional Context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
